---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="video-hero">
  <video class="video-bg" autoplay loop muted playsinline>
    <source src="images/blue.mp4" type="video/mp4"/>
  </video>
</div>

<style>
html, body {
  background: transparent !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

#quarto-content,
#quarto-document-content,
main.content {
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

.video-hero {
  position: fixed;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100vw;
  height: 100vh;
  z-index: -1;
}

.video-bg {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}

.page-footer,
.nav-footer {
  background: transparent !important;
  border-top: none !important;
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
}


</style>
```
